title: The Manson Brothers Midnight Zombie Massacre
original_title: The Manson Brothers: Midnight Zombie Massacre
overview: Two worn-out wrestling brothers take part in a midnight fight on Halloween. What they do not know: While they are trapped in the wrestling arena, their opponents and the audience were infected with a mutated variant of rabies. Equipped only with their martial arts and wrestling masks, the brothers have to fight for their lives and prevent the virus from breaking out.
